text:
Problem 3.4

Walking Backward: More Ratio Problems

The students at Washington are interested in a backward running race. They do some research and find the follow:

  • The winner of the first official backward running race ran 1 mile in 6 minutes 2.35 seconds.
  • The longest walking backward record was 95.4 miles with an average speed of 3.9mph.
Have you ever tried walking or running backward?
